pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the 'Start Date' to July 1, 2024 (2024-07-01).
Task description clearly lists these exact balances for the agent to enter.
Confirmed from the environment setup scripts (setup_data.sh, export_result.sh, setup_task.sh) which use MANAGER_URL='http://localhost:8080'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires entering a start date of 2024-07-01 and specific starting balances (Cash on Hand: 25000.0, AR Alfreds Futterkiste: 3200.0, AR Ernst Handel: 5300.0, AP Exotic Liquids: 4750.0) into the local Manager.io instance running at http://localhost:8080. These targets are synthetically defined within the task description instructions.
